title: Platelet Tests: MedlinePlus Medical Test
text:
Heart, Lung, and Blood Institute [Internet]. Bethesda (MD): U.S. Department of Health and Human Services; Platelet Disorders: Diagnosis; [updated 2022 Mar 24; cited 2024 Apr 09]; [about 3 screens]. Available from: https://www.nhlbi.nih.gov/health/platelet-disorders/diagnosis 
National Heart, Lung, and Blood Institute [Internet]. Bethesda (MD): U.S. Department of Health and Human Services; Thrombocytopenia; [updated 2022 Mar 24; cited 2024 Apr 09]; [about 5 screens]. Available from: https://www.nhlbi.nih.gov/health/thrombocytopenia#:~:text=Thrombocytopenia 
Nemours KidsHealth [Internet]. Jacksonville (FL): The Nemours Foundation; c1995-2024. Getting a Blood Test; [reviewed 2021 Sep; cited 2024 Apr 09]; [about 4 screens]. Available from: https://kidshealth.org/en/parents/blood-tests.html 
NIH National Human Genome Research Institute [Internet]. Bethesda (MD): U.S. Department of Health and Human Services; Genetic Disorders; [updated 2018 May 18; cited 2024 Apr 09]; [about 3 screens]. Available from: https://www.genome.gov/For-Patients-and-Families/Genetic-Disorders
